page_content:
Formerly: EDCP789.

EDCP690 Research in Counseling Psychology | (3 Credits)

Critical analysis of strategies, methodological, conceptual, and content trends.

Prerequisite: For Counseling Psychology majors only.

Cross-listed with: PSYC690.

Formerly: EDCP778.

EDCP691 Research in Counseling Psychology II (3 Credits)

Critical analysis of trends and issues in counseling psychology science. Prerequisite: For Counseling Psychology majors only. Cross-listed with PSYC691.
